dialogueChunks.intro: You've done it. {quest_focus_The} is ours, and there's more than enough to meet our needs. The settlement can breathe easy now.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: {quest_ally} is already putting the {quest_item} to use. {quest_stakes_The} {quest_stakes_is} no longer a worry thanks to your efforts. Even {target_npc} is impressed with how much you brought back.
dialogueChunks.outro: You've earned every bit of what's coming to you, {player_name}. The settlement won't forget this.

dialogueChunks.intro: It was close, but you managed to bring back what we needed. {quest_focus_The} came through, barely.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: The quantity is tight. {quest_ally} says it will cover {quest_stakes_the} if we're careful with rationing. But the fact remains: without you out there fighting through {quest_threat_the}, we'd have nothing at all.
dialogueChunks.outro: Sometimes scraping by is its own kind of victory. Well done, {player_name}.

dialogueChunks.intro: You outdid yourself. Not only did you secure {quest_focus_the}, but the surplus you brought back opens new possibilities for the settlement.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: {target_npc} is already talking about trade opportunities. {quest_ally} says the extra {quest_item} could strengthen our position with neighboring settlements. {quest_stakes_The} {quest_stakes_is} not just met: they're exceeded.
dialogueChunks.outro: You turned a desperate need into an opportunity. {player_name}, you've changed our fortunes.
